description: A developer is receiving a '500 Internal Server Error' when calling a specific API endpoint and needs help diagnosing the cause.

nodes.task_description: Get the customer's account ID, the full API request (endpoint, headers, body), and the approximate time of the error.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all necessary details to investigate the API call.

nodes.task_description: Look up the API request logs using the customer's ID and timestamp to find the specific error trace.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the corresponding error log and stack trace.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the error trace, identify it as a known bug, and provide the customer with a link to the bug report and a suggested workaround.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly diagnoses the issue as a known bug and provides helpful information.
